metadata.name: Send Push Notification for Score Update

description: A fan has subscribed to receive score alerts for their favorite team. An agent must send a push notification after the team scores.

nodes.task_description: Receive a real-time alert that the team has scored.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a notification from the live stats feed.

nodes.task_description: Identify all fans who have subscribed to score alerts for that team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of recipients for the push notification.

nodes.task_description: Send a push notification to the subscribers with the new score.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the notification to all subscribed fans.
